name: totalreclaw
description: End-to-end encrypted memory for AI agents — portable, yours forever. AES-256-GCM E2EE: server never sees plaintext.
author: TotalReclaw Team

before_agent_start.description: Retrieve relevant memories before agent processes message

agent_end.description: Extract and store facts after agent completes turn

pre_compaction.description: Full memory flush before context compaction

tools.name: totalreclaw_remember
tools.description: Store a new fact or preference in long-term memory

text.description: The fact or information to remember

importance.description: Importance score 1-10. Default: auto-detected by LLM

tools.name: totalreclaw_recall
tools.description: Search and retrieve relevant memories from long-term storage

query.description: Natural language query to search memories

tools.name: totalreclaw_forget
tools.description: Delete a specific fact from memory

factId.description: UUID of the fact to delete

tools.name: totalreclaw_export
tools.description: Export all stored memories in plaintext format

tools.name: totalreclaw_status
tools.description: Check billing and subscription status, including quota usage and upgrade options

autoExtractEveryTurns.description: Number of turns between automatic extractions

maxMemoriesInContext.description: Maximum memories to inject into context

rerankerModel.description: ONNX reranker model for result reranking
